system.description:
Discipline: Waijia
Skill: Any Melee (sword) against Parry
Type: Normal
Qi: 2

Wielding a sword in each hand you deliver a forward thrust with one and a violent reverse stab against anyone behind you. This Technique allows you to strike the person di rectly in front of you and the person directly behind you. Make a Melee Skill roll (any Sword) with any sword against Parry. On a Success you can strike a target directly before you and directly behind delivering 1 Extra Wound to both targets. On a Total Success you recover your footing quickly after the Technique and do not take the below penalty to Speed. Delivering this Technique exposes you slightly, meaning on the following round (and only for that round) your Turn Order score drops to 1. Cathartic: Does 2 Extra Wounds to both targets.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.catharticEffect: Does 2 Extra Wounds to both targets.
